name: Machine accident happened at work 3 months ago, is it too late to file in Boise?

mainEntity.name: Machine accident happened at work 3 months ago, is it too late to file in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Probably not too late yet; notify employer immediately and get lawyer.
acceptedAnswer.description: In Idaho, file within 1 year of injury or knowledge; Utah 180 days for notice, 3 years for claim.[8] Delays risk denial but possible if good cause like delayed symptoms.[5] Key factors: Document why late; medical evidence shows progression; employer knew informally. Act now before deadline. Consult attorney for extensions or appeals.

description: Probably not too late yet; notify employer immediately and get lawyer.
